infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TimeCapsule needs camera access to take photos for your time capsules and profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TimeCapsule needs photo library access to add photos to your time capsules.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TimeCapsule uses your location to place capsules on the map and discover nearby capsules.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: TimeCapsule sends notifications when your capsules are ready to open or when friends interact with you.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: TimeCapsule uses your location to place capsules on the map and discover nearby capsules.

plugins.photosPermission: TimeCapsule needs photo library access to add photos to your time capsules.
plugins.cameraPermission: TimeCapsule needs camera access to take photos for your capsules and profile picture.
